productDisplayName: Spinn Men White & Navy Blue Shoes
description: Style NoteCreated for today's generation, this spinn Conniver shoe embodies the brand's motto - combining technology and high-octane fashion. We think these are just right for braving the urban jungle, thanks to their nonchalantly sturdy aesthetic. An all-weather staple, the style perfectly suits the cosmopolitan vibe you love!Product DetailsRound toed casual shoe in white and navy blue with a flat heel and lace-up fastening with flat lacesSynthetic leather upper with overlaysWell padded collar and tongue (with branding)PU midsole with foxing at the toe and back foot regionTPR outsole with rectangle patterned groovesMaterial and CareSynthetic leatherDo not machine wash or store in direct sunlightRemove dust with a dry clean cloth
